title: iOS 27’s new Siri delivers in every single way I’d hoped for
excerpt: Siri AI launches this fall in iOS 27, and after using the beta for a month, the new Siri delivers in all the main ways I was hoping for.
content_html:
Siri AI launches this fall in iOS 27, and after more than a month using the beta, I can happily say the new Siri delivers in every way I’d hoped for.

Siri AI has the three upgrades I wanted most in iOS 27

I’m what you might call a “casual” AI user. I’m not building apps with AI, have no interest in benchmarking models, and mostly just use it as a search replacement.

My guess is this puts me right in line with the average iPhone user. I find AI a useful tool, but I’m not exactly a passionate enthusiast, nor am I fearful of everything labeled ‘AI.’

With that context in mind, after my early iOS 27 testing, I’m glad to report that the new Siri does exactly what I’ve been wanting.

Everyone has their own Siri wishlists, but my personal top three pre-iOS 27 were:

  1. World knowledge
  2. Conversational UI
  3. Consistent and integrated across Apple devices

So far, Siri has delivered on all of these fronts.

Siri AI can answer questions about just about anything. It’s not limited to the select knowledge domains Apple supported before.

The new Siri app is a convenient home for conversations with the assistant. I can ask follow-up questions and revisit past chats with ease.

And unlike the old Siri, which had fragmented capabilities across devices, Siri AI was designed to be the same across all platforms. You’ll get the same Siri intelligence across iPhone, Mac, Apple Watch, iPad, and soon the same should be true on Apple TV and HomePod.

Siri isn’t just consistent across devices, it’s also integrated deeply with Apple’s own apps and services. It offers personalized assistance based on your messages, notes, email, and more—something that’s hard for competitors to match.

Apple first announced an AI-upgraded version of Siri in 2024, and the AI landscape has changed a lot since then. But early signs indicate that for the average iPhone user, iOS 27’s new Siri could prove worth the wait.

What’s your experience with the new Siri in iOS 27 been like? Let us know in the comments.

content_html_zh:
Siri AI 今年秋天在 iOS 27 中发布，经过一个多月的测试版使用，我可以很高兴地说新的 Siri 满足了我所希望的一切。

Siri AI 拥有 iOS 27 中我最想要的三项升级

我就是你所说的“休闲”人工智能用户。 我不会用人工智能构建应用程序，对基准测试模型不感兴趣，而且大多只是将其用作搜索替代品。

我猜这让我与普通 iPhone 用户保持一致。 我发现人工智能是一个有用的工具，但我并不是一个热情的爱好者，也不害怕所有贴有“人工智能”标签的东西。

考虑到这一点，在我对 iOS 27 进行早期测试之后，我很高兴地向大家报告，新的 Siri 完全满足了我的要求。

每个人都有自己的 Siri 愿望清单，但我个人在 iOS 27 之前的前三名愿望清单是：

  1. 世界知识
  2. 对话式用户界面
  3. 跨 Apple 设备保持一致和集成

到目前为止，Siri 已经在所有这些方面实现了目标。

Siri AI 可以回答几乎任何问题。 它不仅限于苹果之前支持的选定知识领域。

新的 Siri 应用程序是与助理对话的便捷之家。 我可以轻松提出后续问题并回顾过去的聊天记录。

与旧版 Siri 跨设备的功能分散不同，Siri AI 的设计在所有平台上都是相同的。 您将在 iPhone、Mac、Apple Watch、iPad 上获得相同的 Siri 智能，并且很快在 Apple TV 和 HomePod 上也应该如此。

Siri 不仅在不同设备上保持一致，而且还与苹果自己的应用程序和服务深度集成。 它根据您的消息、笔记、电子邮件等提供个性化帮助，这是竞争对手难以比拟的。

苹果在 2024 年首次发布了 Siri 的 AI 升级版本，自那时以来，AI 格局发生了很大变化。 但早期迹象表明，对于普通 iPhone 用户来说，iOS 27 的新 Siri 可能值得等待。

您对 iOS 27 中的新 Siri 的体验如何？ 请在评论中告诉我们。

  • AirPods Pro 3（现仅需 199 美元，原价 249 美元）
  • 适用于 iPhone 的 MagSafe 车载支架
  • 10 年 AirTag 电池盒
  • 100W USB-C 快充电源适配器
  • AirTag 2（1 件/4 件）
